{{Quote|Right now you're nothing but mynock droppings, but when I'm finished with you, you'll be soldiers!|"Slag" Jankar|<ref name="ITAN" />}}
[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] '''"Slag" Jankar''' was the toughest [[drill instructor]] at [[Training Camp IMIIF-138]] on [[Sirpar/Legends|Sirpar]]. He was a veteran of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] and a non-[[Cloning/Legends|clone]] veteran of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] before that. He was disgusted with the Republic Army, which he considered to be corrupt and inefficient, and thus admired [[Palpatine/Legends|the Emperor]] for bringing back order, pride and discipline to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Jankar had the highest success rate of turning troublesome recruits into crack [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]. His face was craggy and weather-bitten, and he was a large man with a booming voice, always donning an immaculate Imperial Army uniform. Jankar virtually never spoke, but always shouted when addressing trainees.
